headline.label: 9 out of 10 typical workloads should stay on the API

api_models.name: Claude Haiku 4
api_models.typical_price_source: Anthropic and OpenRouter published API pricing
api_models.quality_caveat: These open-weight options can be evaluated for support, summarization, and coding-adjacent workflows, but they are not quality-equivalent to Claude.

api_models.name: Claude Sonnet 5
api_models.typical_price_source: Anthropic and OpenRouter published API pricing
api_models.quality_caveat: Frontier hosted models differ materially in reasoning, tool use, safety behavior, and latency; use these mappings only as candidate self-host investigations.

api_models.name: Gemini 2.5 Flash
api_models.typical_price_source: Google AI Studio and OpenRouter published API pricing
api_models.quality_caveat: Flash-class API models optimize latency and price; mapped open weights may need task-specific evaluation before replacement.

api_models.name: GPT-5 mini
api_models.typical_price_source: OpenAI and OpenRouter published API pricing
api_models.quality_caveat: These models are plausible efficient substitutes for narrow or cost-sensitive workloads, not quality-identical replacements for GPT-5 mini.

api_models.name: GPT-5
api_models.typical_price_source: OpenAI and OpenRouter published API pricing
api_models.quality_caveat: The mapped open-weight models are not asserted to match GPT-5 quality; they are credible candidates when cost, compliance, or capacity forces a self-host investigation.

api_models.name: Other / not listed
api_models.quality_caveat: Because this hosted model is not mapped precisely, RunWhere cannot make a confident quality or cost-boundary claim.

models.name: DeepSeek V3.2
models.one_liner: Frontier reasoning with sparse attention for efficient long context.

models.name: Gemma 4 26B
models.one_liner: Efficient multimodal model with strong throughput-per-dollar.

models.name: GLM-5.1
models.one_liner: Long-horizon agentic execution with sparse attention.

models.name: Kimi K2.5
models.one_liner: Large MoE for agentic workflows and upper-bound cost regimes.

models.name: Llama 4 Maverick
models.one_liner: Meta's flagship MoE for general reasoning and coding.

models.name: Llama 4 Scout
models.one_liner: Meta's long-context variant for document-heavy workloads.

models.name: Mistral Large 3
models.one_liner: Mistral's frontier model for agentic and multimodal systems.

models.name: Mistral Small 4
models.one_liner: Right-sized workhorse for real-time use at lower hardware cost.

models.name: Nemotron Cascade 2
models.one_liner: Inference-optimized hybrid model for high-throughput serving.

models.name: Phi-4
models.one_liner: Small reasoning model with a low hardware floor.

models.name: Qwen 3.5
models.one_liner: Alibaba's general-purpose MoE with strong coding and multilingual coverage.

models.name: Qwen3-Coder-480B
models.one_liner: Purpose-built for agentic coding among open-weight models.
